channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: Sweetgreen: Alice Waters' Peach & Goat Cheese Salad — Limited-Edition Summer Collab
item.description: A limited-edition seasonal salad created with chef Alice Waters, available nationwide via app, online, and delivery through August 10. (Through August 10, 2026)

item.title: Panera Bread: BOGO for $5 — Buy One Entrée, Get Another for $5
item.guid: Panera Bread-BOGO for $5 — Buy One Entrée, Get Anothe-2026-07-14
item.description: Use code BOGO5 at checkout to get a second whole sandwich, salad, soup, or bowl for just $5 with any qualifying purchase. (Limited time)

item.title: Domino's: $9.99 Any Pizza, Any Crust, Any Toppings
item.guid: Domino's-$9.99 Any Pizza, Any Crust, Any Toppings-2026-07-14
item.description: Get any Domino's pizza with any crust and up to any toppings — including Parmesan Stuffed Crust — for $9.99 each. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Panera Bread: Mix & Match $4.99 Menu — Up to 10 Half-Portions
item.guid: Panera Bread-Mix & Match $4.99 Menu — Up to 10 Ha-2026-07-14
item.description: Select up to 10 half-portion soups, sandwiches, or salads from the Mix & Match menu at ~40% off regular prices, plus one side per order. (Ongoing)

item.title: Arby's: $1.99 Sliders — Any Slider, Any Time
item.guid: Arby's-$1.99 Sliders — Any Slider, Any Time-2026-07-14
item.description: Score any Arby's Slider for just $1.99 each at participating locations for a limited time. (Limited time)

item.title: McDonald's: $5 Value Meal — McDouble or McChicken Combo
item.guid: McDonald's-$5 Value Meal — McDouble or McChicken Co-2026-07-14
item.description: Order through the McDonald's app to get a $5 meal including your choice of McDouble or McChicken, 4-pc McNuggets, small fries, and a small drink. (Ongoing)

item.title: Wendy's: $5 Biggie Bag
item.description: Get a Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger or Crispy Chicken BLT, 4-pc nuggets, small fries, and a small drink for $5 via the Wendy's app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Burger King: $5 Your Way Meal
item.description: Get a Double Cheeseburger or Crispy Chicken Jr., 4-pc nuggets, small fries, and small drink for $5 daily via the BK app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Subway: Moana Movie Meal Deal — Upgrade Any Combo for $1 More
item.guid: Subway-Moana Movie Meal Deal — Upgrade Any Comb-2026-07-14
item.description: Upgrade any Subway combo meal for just $1 extra to get a collectible Moana cup and a $15 Fandango promo code to see the film. (Limited time)

item.title: KFC: $10 Chicken Bucket Deal
item.description: Grab a bucket of KFC fried chicken — Original or Extra Crispy — for $10 at participating locations this month. (Limited time)

item.title: Popeyes: 12 Wings or Tenders for $12
item.description: Score 12 of Popeyes' wings or chicken tenders for just $12 for a limited time at participating locations. (Limited time)

item.title: Dairy Queen: $7 Meal Deal — 3-Piece Chicken Strip or Cheeseburger Meal
item.guid: Dairy Queen-$7 Meal Deal — 3-Piece Chicken Strip or -2026-07-14
item.description: Get a 3-piece Chicken Strip Meal Deal or Original Cheeseburger Meal Deal for $7, and upgrade to a Blizzard for $2 more. (Limited time)

item.title: Shake Shack: App Picks: $2 Sodas, $4 Fries & $6 Shakes
item.guid: Shake Shack-App Picks: $2 Sodas, $4 Fries & $6 S-2026-07-14
item.description: Order online through the Shake Shack app or website at participating locations to unlock $2 sodas, $4 fries, and $6 shakes — excluding limited-time shakes. (Ongoing)

item.title: Dunkin': Limited-Edition Eagle Cup — $10.99 with Free Medium Beverage
item.description: Pick up the Dunkin' Eagle Cup for $10.99 and receive a free medium beverage plus a code for a $3 medium drink or Refresher daily for 30 days. (While supplies last)

item.title: Cold Stone Creamery: $5 Off $10+ — Text LOVEIT26 to 568348
item.guid: Cold Stone Creamery-$5 Off $10+ — Text LOVEIT26 to 568348-2026-07-14
item.description: Text LOVEIT26 to 568348 to unlock a $5 off any $10+ in-store or app purchase at Cold Stone Creamery through July 31. (Through July 31, 2026)
